channel.title: calendar on Random Research Ruminations
channel.description: Recent content in calendar on Random Research Ruminations

item.title: Setup for sharing org-mode agenda with google calendar
item.description: Setup for sharing org-mode agenda with google calendar (and mobile devices) Note: this is only one-directional from org-mode to google calendar. First step: setup org-mode to export all the agenda-files to an ics file. Put this into the .emacs file (I save the agenda to dropbox). (setq org-icalendar-combined-agenda-file "~/Dropbox/orgfiles/org.ics") (setq org-icalendar-include-todo '(all)) (setq org-icalendar-use-scheduled '(event-if-todo event-if-not-todo)) (setq org-icalendar-use-deadline '(event-if-todo event-if-not-todo)) ;; this hook saves an ics file once an org-buffer is saved (defun my-icalendar-agenda-export() (if (string= (file-name-extension (buffer-file-name)) "org") (org-icalendar-combine-agenda-files)) ) (add-hook 'after-save-hook 'my-icalendar-agenda-export) Second: share in dropbox In your dropbox folder on the web, click on share and "
